title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush covers!
reviews.text:
Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well
reviews.text: Just what they say they are. They fit our electric toothbrush heads perfectly. Easy to open and close.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: Preserve Eco Friendly Adult Toothbrushes, Made in The USA from Recycled Plastic, Soft Bristles, Colors Vary, 6 Count
description: Preserve toothbrush in travel case 6-pk, soft bristle Preserve consulted closely with dental professionals to create a toothbrush that gets your teeth cleaner but minimizes your impact on the environment. The design includes a curved handle for those hard-to-reach places and a three-level bristle arrangement to massage your gums. And while the bristles are brand new, the handle is made from recycled yogurt cups. The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. Available in assorted colors including grass green, midnight blue, sky blue, magenta and white. - Product measures: 0.875x.5x8.875 - manufactured in: Made in the USA.
features: 100% recycled plastics in handle, at least 25% recycled stony field farm« yogurt cups

title: Kank-A Soft Brush Tooth Mouth Pain Gel Maximum Strength, White, 0.21 Oz, Pack of 3
description: Kank-A SoftBrush is the first oral pain treatment to deliver medication in a unique, self-contained brush-tipped dispenser. The sleek, pen-like applicator makes it easier than ever to comfortably and precisely target pain - including between teeth and braces. The no-drip, ultra-soft brush applies the pain-relieving gel evenly and directly to sore areas, with a comfortable touch that won't irritate or aggravate the area. SoftBrush delivers medication in a mild, pleasant tasting gel to treat pain caused by toothaches and minor irritation of the mouth and gums, including irritation from braces, dentures and other orthodontic appliances. The dual relief formula contains a maximum strength anesthetic combined with an active oral astringent for fast, effective relief.
features: 0.07 Ounce(pack of 3);PAIN RELIEF: Stops tooth and gum pain from toothaches, irritation from braces and dentures, and canker sores on contact
UNIQUE PEN-LIKE BRUSH APPLICATOR: Makes it easy to get to those hard to reach areas comfortably
DUAL MEDICATIONS: Combines two analgesics for dual relief
PLEASANT TASTE: SoftBrush gel formula has no unpleasant taste, tackiness, or sting
ON-THE-GO TREATMENT: Slender design fits well in hand and travels well in purse or pocket

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: Great value for the price, quantity, and quantity. Exactly what you’d get if you purchased in store. Helps with pain! Especially helps with pain from wisdom teeth. It does wear off, but I just reapply. FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS! Do not keep reapplying more than what is recommended!

reviews.title: This works for numbing
reviews.text: This really relieves the pain, at least for awhile.  I don't think it works so much to heal but no pain is a good thing.

reviews.title: Gets inbetween teeth well.
reviews.text: I tried it for my teeth pain, turns out i have Trigeminal neuralgia and im just feeling pain in my teeth, i gave it to my brother for his tooth pain, he ended up coming back for the other two (i ordered 3) works great. Gets in those hard to reach places.

reviews.title: Totally worth the price/for best results...dry your canker before applying gel
reviews.text:
I suffer from Canker sores all the time. I get them so bad, it hurts to even speak.
My sister actually turned me on to Kank-A Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel,. It really works.
Of course I had to figure out how to use it in a way that better suits me.
Best Way to use it: When you feel that canker coming on in your mouth....dry that area as much as possible. Use either a cotton ball or a tissue to dry the surface area where the sore is. The dryer the spot, the better contact you can make with the Kank-A SoftBrush Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel, Apply the gel directly to your canker sore and give it a little time to actually start drying on the sore. Sometimes you do have to sit there with your tongue out- but if you want to treat it fast and get the gel into the sore better, its worth it. Once the gel is pretty much set in, you can go back to your normal routine. You will have to reapply it a few times a day.
For the best maximum treatment and results, put it on your Canker right before going to sleep. The gel will have time to work its magic while you sleep...totally recommend using this.

reviews.title: Works great but not for long
reviews.text: It does numb the pain at first but doesn't last as long as the beads.  Maybe that's not the point... maybe it shouldn't last too long... it's a numbing agent.

Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 6 multi-colored Hot Wheels kid's toothbrushes.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique car designs, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

reviews.title: No stand
reviews.text: I wish it had a stand to hold it upright. The toothbrush quit working. Waste of money

reviews.title: Battery life is NOT what it claims
reviews.text: I've been trying to give this toothbrush the benefit of the doubt, but I give up. I charge it, and for 15 seconds it runs full strength, then slowly declines like my older brush was doing, not holding a charge. Not sure when this was manufactured, or how old the battery is, but it's not holding a charge. It will not run for 365 days on one charge, that's for sure. I will have to return.

reviews.title: Worth every cent
reviews.text: Works wonderfully . Especially for the price

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush

title: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Philips Sonicare ProtectiveClean 5300 Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush, Black, HX6423/34
description: Improve your gum health up to 100% better than a manual toothbrush with the ProtectiveClean 5300 rechargeable electric toothbrush. It has a pressure sensor that protects teeth and gums from excess brushing pressure. Customize your own brushing experience with your choice of 3 modes: Clean, White and Gum Care. Our BrushSync technology tracks how long you have been using your Optimal Gum Care brush head and how hard you have been brushing. Your electric toothbrush will beep to inform you when to replace your brush head. The easy-start feature slowly increases the power of the brush as you get used to the Sonicare experience and the SmarTimer encourages a full 2 minute brushing time as recommended by your dental professional. The battery indicator light lets you know when it is time recharge; 2 week battery life. The kit includes 1 ProtectiveClean 5300 handle, 1 Optimal Gum Care brush head, 1 charger, 1 travel case, and 2 extra DiamondClean brush heads. Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.

reviews.text: Love this toothbrush

reviews.title: Hate the feeling
reviews.text:
Picked this up alongside an OralB toothbrush to compare and...I don't understand why people like the Sonicare toothbrushes.

I've seen people say that you have to get used to the feeling, but it just feels awful. Not even necessarily the regular use, but if you accidentally touch the plastic to your teeth you get a horrible vibration feeling that shoots through your jaw/entire head. It also feels awful if you touch it on your lips on accident, too.

This alone made me return it in favor of the Oral B.

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.
